hero.title: Cinco de Mayo: La Batalla
hero.reason: In honor of Cinco de Mayo, a film that captures the spirit of this day, highlighting the bravery and patriotism of the Mexican army's victory over the French Empire.
hero.blurb: This gripping historical drama brings to life the Battle of Puebla, showcasing the heroic deeds of the Mexican soldiers. With its epic battles and emotional storytelling, it's a must-watch on this special day.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero blockbuster still holds up with its darker tone, complex characters, and impressive action sequences.
released.blurb: The third installment of the Spider-Man franchise sees Peter Parker facing his greatest challenges yet, from the villainous Venom to his own personal demons. With its thrilling action and emotional depth, it's a Spider-Man film that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

birthday.title: The Great Buck Howard
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to John Malkovich, born May 5, 1953, starring in this offbeat comedy-drama that showcases his unique talent and charisma.
birthday.blurb: John Malkovich shines as the titular character, a self-proclaimed mentalist with a flair for the dramatic. With its quirky humor and heartfelt storytelling, this film is a hidden gem that will leave you smiling.

awful.title: Son of the Mask
awful.reason: This infamous comedy sequel is often cited as one of the worst films of the 2000s, with a convoluted plot, lackluster humor, and cringeworthy performances.
awful.blurb: With its messy storyline and poorly executed jokes, Son of the Mask is a laughingstock that will leave you groaning. It's a trainwreck that you can't look away from, making it a fascinatingly bad film that's worth watching for its sheer audacity.
